title: GPT 5.6 SOL: TBH, IT'S OKAY.. I have SERIOUS CONCERNS.
summary: AICodeKing reviews GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna, finding them competent but not revolutionary. The author notes mixed benchmark results, underperformance of Luna, concerning cyber capabilities despite OpenAI's safety claims, and questions whether these represent meaningful advances over GPT-5.5.
writeup: AICodeKing reviews OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna models, assessing them as competent but not revolutionary. Benchmark results are mixed, with Luna underperforming and the lineup raising the question of whether it advances meaningfully over GPT-5.5. The review flags concerning cyber capabilities despite OpenAI's safety claims, referencing the Cyber Critical threshold, the Preparedness Framework, red teaming, and the system card.
